name: Armin
cooked: You’re correct. A single low-r/high-r pair isn’t conclusive and the language here is definitive. However, the signal could compound across the graph. If we traverse the graph and observe a skewed distribution of low-r signatures between the two candidate partitions, this could be evidence for one assignment over the other. Will have to reword this section, thanks.
topic_title: How wallet fingerprints damage Payjoin privacy
